_comment: OpenAI Secure MCP Tunnel client config — reuses the Portia-pattern setup already proven for this user (design.md §D15 bridge A). The tunnel authenticates outbound to OpenAI's relay; the hub never opens a public listener — mcp_server.py binds 127.0.0.1 only and the tunnel forwards to it locally.
_placeholders: auth_token — issued by the OpenAI Secure MCP Tunnel dashboard; do not commit the real value
credential — the per-connection value sent as the X-MPB-Credential header; maps 1:1 to provider/chatgpt in hub/mcp_server.py's CREDENTIAL_PROVIDER_MAP
